pages.title: Remote Work Internet Stipend – Government Regulation 2027
pages.content: The Department of Labor and Employment, under the Remote Work Act of 2027, mandates that all eligible remote employees receive a monthly internet stipend of $50 per month to cover connectivity costs. This stipend is non-taxable and must be provided directly to the employee or reimbursed upon submission of monthly receipts. Employers are responsible for compliance and must include this stipend in their remote work policies.
